prompt: 昨天只睡了 6.87h，light sleep 占了 61%，但精力还行有 7。今天帮我排个时间表吧，下午有个 team meeting 15:00-16:00

assertions.name: reads-recent-logs
assertions.text: Response references actual data from recent daily logs (e.g., specific sleep metrics, body composition, or spending data)

assertions.name: timetable-format
assertions.text: Response contains a structured timetable with specific time blocks (HH:MM format) covering wake-to-shutdown

assertions.name: meeting-constraint
assertions.text: The timetable accounts for the 15:00-16:00 team meeting and adjusts workout/other activities accordingly

assertions.name: meal-costs
assertions.text: Meals include cost estimates in RM based on grocery unit prices from user_profile.md

assertions.name: circuit-breaker-check
assertions.text: Response checks circuit breaker status and correctly identifies that no breaker is tripped (6.87h > 6.5h threshold, energy 7 > 4)

assertions.name: asks-for-confirmation
assertions.text: Response explicitly asks the user for adjustments or confirmation before finalizing the timetable

assertions.name: bilingual
assertions.text: Response uses Chinese as primary language with English technical terms (Deep Work, Circuit Breaker, etc.)
